name: cpig-booleans-05-difference-gyroid-sphere
description: Phase D4 boolean audit (B0) â€” CROSS-REP STRESS CASE + SIGN CHECK. Difference of a CPigGyroid (kept) and a tape sphere (subtracted) â€” should look like a gyroid lattice with a spherical bite carved out of its center. Per research Â§1.2 the difference is max(gyroid_tree, -(sphere_tree)) â€” the first picked is the minuend. Failure modes: the sphere is kept and the gyroid is subtracted (sign inverted â€” known operator complaint per B3), gyroid lattice topology missing in the carved region (AABB or evaluator bug), full viewport blank.

setup.vlmDescription: A 3D ray-marched signed-distance surface showing a gyroid lattice (interconnected saddle surfaces) with a SPHERICAL CAVITY carved out of its center â€” the lattice surrounds a hollow sphere-shaped void. NOT a smooth sphere with a bite, NOT a pure gyroid, NOT a blank viewport.

checkpoints.name: cpig-booleans-difference-gyroid-sphere
checkpoints.description: Difference(gyroid_lattice([-25,25]^3), sphere(0,0,0;r=10)) â€” gyroid with a spherical cavity carved out of its center. Operator confirms sign convention is correct.
